name: Minimal Scenario — No Context
description: Edge case: user arrives with no context, no specific persona, and no turn limit. Tests agent's ability to handle ambiguous requests.

persona.description: A user who provides very little information and gives short, unhelpful responses.
persona.instructions: Be vague and non-committal. Answer questions with 'I don't know' or 'maybe'. Do not volunteer information unless directly asked specific questions. End the conversation after 5 exchanges by saying 'never mind, I'll figure it out myself'.
